patternDrafts.title: Pattern Draft: Workout route + model pairing
patternDrafts.mechanism: API route handlers consistently map request payloads to workout model contracts.
patternDrafts.invariant: Each route references an explicit workout/domain model before persistence.

metaFindings.duplication: Repeated workout card layout and API response transforms suggest extractable shared contracts.
metaFindings.architectureDrift: Any API logic outside api route folders is flagged as drift evidence.
metaFindings.patternReuse: Draft patterns are tracked for reuse only after explicit human promotion decisions.

documentationUpdates.rule: Pilot deployments of the reasoning engine must operate in advisory mode.
documentationUpdates.pattern: Real repositories provide the feedback loop needed to validate reasoning engines.
documentationUpdates.failureMode: Allowing automated system mutation before governance stability.
